mnemonics: Dedicated Engineers Can't Actually Ignore Specifications (DECAIS) for Design, Establish, Construct, Analyze, Implement, Simulate
keyPoints: Start with a clear problem specification.
Choose the correct level of abstraction (e.g., behavioral, structural).
Verify the design through simulation before implementation.
commonMistakes: Skipping the simulation and verification step, leading to faulty hardware.
Not properly defining all inputs and outputs in the initial specification.
